self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Tupac's Grip (R5): on hit, deal AoE DMG equal to 80% of Max HP at the target's location (triggers at most once per 15s). No eval-time key models a standalone Max-HP-scaled bonus damage instance, so this is approximated as a flat +5% all_dmg_ uplift representing the averaged DPS contribution of the periodic proc for a moderate-HP build; the real value scales with the wielder's actual Max HP and rotation length.
